dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 1
dialogue_segments.text: They want you afraid. Fear makes you easier to control.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 1
dialogue_segments.text: But we are not afraid.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 2
dialogue_segments.text: The streets shall once again run red.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 3
dialogue_segments.text: Raul Menendez ignited global unrest on an unprecedented scale.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 1
dialogue_segments.text: Menendez is a Terrorist. We're bringing peace and security to the world.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 4
dialogue_segments.text: He refuses to let me go.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 5
dialogue_segments.text: Stop looking backwards, David, but what matters is what we do next.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 5
dialogue_segments.text: A lot of people counting on us for answers.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 5
dialogue_segments.text: Spectre 1, report.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 6
dialogue_segments.text: Need a sitrep.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 4
dialogue_segments.text: This isn't real. The hell it is.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 7
dialogue_segments.text: Obey our master, control our master.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 7
dialogue_segments.text: Master of the invisible, master of the space. Master of your mind, master of your fate.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 7
dialogue_segments.text: Master, master, wins and brings it all in after. Master, master, we will be the ones to cry.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 5
dialogue_segments.text: Pull it together, man!

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 2
dialogue_segments.text: So eager to leave, are we?

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 2
dialogue_segments.text: Kill them, men.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 8
dialogue_segments.text: It's a hell of a lot easier than killing the idea.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 2
dialogue_segments.text: You were never cut out to be a Mason.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 2
dialogue_segments.text: No more games. This ends now.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 7
dialogue_segments.text: Obey your master!

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 3
dialogue_segments.text: Get the Reznov challenge pack. And you pre-order now.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 7
dialogue_segments.text: Master, master, wins and brings it all in after. Master, master, we will be the ones to cry. Obey your master!

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 3
dialogue_segments.text: Get the Reznov challenge pack.

Voice separation reminders:
- speaker_id continuity is acoustic, not semantic. A speaker naming another person is not evidence they are that person.
- Do not merge narration/figurehead VO, antagonist taunts, female radio/comms, gruff soldier responses, and promo-announcer copy unless the voice itself clearly matches.
- If delivery shifts from direct character/threat speech into official public-address, newsreel, briefing, or expository narration, prefer a new speaker_id unless the exact same voice clearly continues.
- If adjacent words are one uninterrupted utterance from the same voice, keep them together instead of splitting them into artificial fragments.
- The handoff is reference-only memory. Never copy or continue prior lines unless they are audibly present in THIS chunk.
- If the current chunk only contains one audible promo/narration line, return only that line; do not invent follow-up tactical chatter from prior chunks.

- Speaker 3 (spk_003): Get the Reznov challenge pack.

segments.description: Intense, cinematic action trailer audio featuring a dramatic orchestral score, sound effects like impacts and whooshes, and prominent voice-over dialogue.
Dramatic, cinematic orchestral music with driving percussion and intense sound effects, punctuated by a voice-over.
Intense, high-energy rock/cinematic music with aggressive male voice-over dialogue and sound effects.
High-intensity, cinematic action music with dramatic dialogue and sound effects.
Intense, driving cinematic music with aggressive sound effects and a promotional voice-over.

musicData.summary: The audio maintains a high-stakes, intense cinematic tone throughout, driven by aggressive music, sound effects, and dramatic voice-over.

chunks.summary: A high-octane game trailer opening with glitchy text, rapid cuts of robots and destruction, and a celebrity face reveal amidst chaos.

patience.reasoning: The 'RISING TENSIONS' buzzword at 0.0s triggers my scroll reflex, but the fast pacing keeps me on the fence.

boredom.reasoning: Too much visual noise and scene changes every second to feel bored, even if the content feels generic.

excitement.reasoning: Aggressive music and destruction visuals create hype, especially when the human face appears at 4.0s.

chunks.summary: Fast-paced trailer chunk featuring a soldier in a warzone, glitchy face close-ups, and falling cars with bold text overlays.

patience.reasoning: Opening soldier shot is borderline generic military cliché, but the rapid glitch transitions and text before 3s keep my thumb still.

boredom.reasoning: Visuals change every second with high-stakes destruction; no static shots or dead air to zone out on.

excitement.reasoning: The 'THEY WANT YOU AFRAID' text and falling cars spike the adrenaline; feels cinematic and authentic to the genre.

chunks.summary: Cinematic city skyline transitions to a static game logo, followed by a glitchy name reveal and a damaged screen displaying a character's face amidst fire and rubble.

patience.reasoning: The static logo and talking head on a screen test my limits; I want gameplay or action, not cinematics.

boredom.reasoning: Holding on the logo and the broken screen feels slow; visual energy drops significantly.

excitement.reasoning: The glitch effects and background fire keep it from being totally dead, but it's not high-energy.
